comment: Really dislike the new ui. It is not intuitive to use, lacks helpful information visible from the main screen like recent translations, and does not appear to auto adjust my keyboard language like the old one. There should be an option to opt out of this redesign, it significantly reduced my productivity in the app.
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
